title: Short title
doc_html:
PART V. RECREATIONAL VEHICLE WARRANTIES

§1270.31. Short title

            This Part shall be known as and may be cited as the "New Recreational Vehicle Warranty Act".

            Acts 2021, No. 220, §1.

PART V. RECREATIONAL VEHICLE WARRANTIES

Warranty Act".
Acts 2021, No. 220, §1.
